nodes.name: Webhook Verification
nodes.notes: Meta webhook verification (GET). Must respond with hub.challenge value to activate the webhook.

nodes.name: Check Verify Token
nodes.notes: Verifies Meta's hub.verify_token against META_WEBHOOK_VERIFY_TOKEN env var.

nodes.name: Token Valid?
nodes.notes: Routes valid tokens to challenge response, invalid to 403.

nodes.name: Challenge Response
nodes.notes: Returns hub.challenge to verify webhook endpoint.

nodes.name: Webhook Events
nodes.notes: Receives POST events from Meta: delivery receipts, read receipts, failures, and button replies.

nodes.name: Verify Signature
nodes.notes: Verifies X-Hub-Signature-256 HMAC-SHA256. For production, enable Raw Body on the Webhook node. Set META_WEBHOOK_SECRET in env.

nodes.name: Signature Valid?
nodes.notes: Routes valid signatures to processing, invalid to log and acknowledge.

parameters.code:
const items = $input.all();
return items.map(item => ({ json: { ...item.json, _event_type: 'sig_invalid', _log: 'Invalid signature: ' + (item.json._sig_error || 'unknown') } }));

nodes.name: Log Invalid Sig
nodes.notes: Logs invalid signature and still acks 200 to prevent Meta retries.

nodes.name: Parse Events
nodes.notes: Parses Meta webhook payload: extracts status (delivered/read/failed) and button_reply events. For button replies, parses order_id from CONFIRM_ORDER|uuid format.

nodes.name: Route Event
nodes.notes: Routes events to handlers: button_reply → order update, delivered/read/failed → status tracking.

nodes.name: Parse Button Reply
nodes.notes: Maps button action: CONFIRM_ORDER → confirmed, CANCEL_ORDER → cancelled.

nodes.name: Update Order Status
nodes.notes: Updates orders table with confirmed/cancelled status from button reply.

nodes.name: Update Log Status
nodes.notes: Updates message_logs with delivery/read/failed status using provider_message_id.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ { "provider_message_id": $json._provider_message_id, "store_id": $json.id || null, "status": $json._event_type, "error_message": $json._error_title || null, "recipient_id": $json._recipient_id || null, "timestamp": $json._status_timestamp ? new Date(parseInt($json._status_timestamp) * 1000).toISOString() : new Date().toISOString(), "raw_payload": { event_type: $json._event_type, conversation_id: $json._conversation_id } } }}

nodes.name: Insert Message Status
nodes.notes: Inserts delivery/read/failed event into message_status table for audit trail.

nodes.name: Update Orders Status
nodes.notes: Updates orders table with delivery/read/failed status and timestamps using provider_message_id.

nodes.name: Refresh Metrics
nodes.notes: Refreshes metrics cache after status update.

nodes.name: Acknowledge Webhook
nodes.notes: Always returns 200 to Meta to prevent retries.
